title: Our Services | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
You tell us where. We’ll tell you how. Whether you’re a start-up, smaller local business or one of the world’s largest companies, we can support all your immigration needs, all over the world. Our services go beyond preparing and filing visa and work permit applications. We provide strategic consultative services and support to meet the full spectrum of business immigration needs.
All services are designed to provide value in accordance with your business goals. We work together to improve your speed-to-ground and help you mobilize your employee population so that you can remain a cutting-edge player in your industry—wherever you operate. And for employees, we appreciate the importance of working with a caring professional who guides you through the immigration journey from start to finish.
- Business Visa Services and Technology Guidance, support and technology to help you get your business travelers on the ground quickly and compliantly. Read more
Guidance, support and technology to help you get your business travelers on the ground quickly and compliantly.
- Connecting Employers with Skilled Displaced Individuals Assistance with integrating displaced individuals into your talent pipeline. Read more
Assistance with integrating displaced individuals into your talent pipeline.
- Consular Services Personalized support to help ease the burden of complex immigration consular processing. Read more
Personalized support to help ease the burden of complex immigration consular processing.
- Corporate Immigration Program Development World-class corporate immigration services to help you optimize your immigration operations. Read more
World-class corporate immigration services to help you optimize your immigration operations.

Robust resources to help you understand immigration in a changing world.

Experienced guidance to help manage your most complicated immigration activities and maximize your compliance.
- Immigration Enforcement Defense Services Enforcement defense and internal investigations assistance to help defend your business against immigration noncompliance. Read more
Enforcement defense and internal investigations assistance to help defend your business against immigration noncompliance.
- Immigration Litigation Services Experienced, skilled immigration litigation to help you resolve complex situations. Read more
Experienced, skilled immigration litigation to help you resolve complex situations.
- Immigration Technology Solutions Pragmatic, leading-edge technology solutions that support our clients’ immigration experiences. Read more
Pragmatic, leading-edge technology solutions that support our clients’ immigration experiences.
- Immigration Training Unmatched training means better immigration experiences for your employees. Read more
Unmatched training means better immigration experiences for your employees.
- Immigration Work Permit Services Comprehensive, end-to-end immigration services and technology to help streamline business immigration. Read more
Comprehensive, end-to-end immigration services and technology to help streamline business immigration.
- Private Client Services Sound, holistic alternative residency and citizenship solutions to help you seize your opportunities. Read more
Sound, holistic alternative residency and citizenship solutions to help you seize your opportunities.
- Remobilization Services Strategic support to help remobilize quickly and prepare for the future of work. Read more
Strategic support to help remobilize quickly and prepare for the future of work.
- Remote Work Strategic Services for Employers As the world moves forward from the pandemic, some companies are calling employees back to the office full-time, while others are implementing or formalizing hybrid work schedules. Read more

## Explore more at Fragomen
Fragomen earned top national and regional rankings in Chambers USA 2026, including its 13th consecutive year in Band 1 nationwide.
Senior Manager Samantha Arnold examines the remaining opportunities under Ireland’s winding-down Immigrant Investor Programme and what they mean for eligible investors and their families.
Government Affairs Strategy Director Shuyeb Muquit analyses the UK’s latest net migration decline, exploring what the data reveals about policy impact, economic trade‑offs and the risks of over‑correction in future migration strategy.
Partner Bo Cooper discusses the practical considerations facing employers and foreign nationals amid recent changes to green card processing.
In this #FragomenFC episode, Partner Rick Lamanna, Senior Manager Sergio Flores and Senior Associate Jake Paul Minster discuss final travel and immigration considerations ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
Senior Manager Samantha Arnold discusses Ireland’s citizenship framework and the gaps that can remain following reforms to birthright citizenship.
In this video, Partner Diana Quintas discusses how Brazil’s family reunion visa supports long-term international assignments and outlines key eligibility, documentation and compliance considerations for employers and families relocating to Brazil.
Attorney María José Clarke explores Chile’s intensified immigration enforcement framework under President José Antonio Kast, examining new employer compliance obligations, work authorization rules for foreign nationals and the legal and financial consequences of unauthorized employment.
Senior Manager Jonathan Hill examines how the UK’s new RAG rating system and stricter compliance metrics could shape universities’ approaches to international student recruitment and sponsorship compliance.
Knowledge Management Director Ana Sofia Walsh and Senior Client Engagement Manager Soraya Driessen examine the European Commission’s EU Inc. proposal and its potential to reshape corporate structures across the EU, highlighting the resulting complexities and unresolved questions for immigration, work authorization and cross-border workforce mobility.
